zh.Patrixbourne, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特帕特利布恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Cheyne於大約1274年出生在英國時，他的父親Alexander de Cheney II28歲，母親Agnes de Say26歲。他於大約1302年與Margaret Shurland在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1322年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.Patrixbourne, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特帕特利布恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Cheyne于大约1274年出生在英国时，他的父亲Alexander de Cheney II28岁，母亲Agnes de Say26岁。他于大约1302年与Margaret Shurland在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1322年在英国英格兰越可爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Cheyne was born about 1274, in England, his father, Alexander de Cheney II, was 28 and his mother, Agnes de Say, was 26. He married Margaret Shurland about 1302, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1322, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Cheyne est né environ 1274, à Angleterre, son père, Alexander de Cheney II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Say, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Shurland environ 1302, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1322, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Cheyne um 1274 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander de Cheney II 28 und seine Mutter Agnes de Say 26. Er hat um 1302 in Kent, England Margaret Shurland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Cheyne è nato il circa 1274 nel England, il suo padre, Alexander de Cheney II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Say, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Shurland circa 1302, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1322, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Cheyneが約1274年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Alexander de Cheney IIは28歳，母Agnes de Sayは26歳であった。約1302年にイギリスケントでMargaret Shurlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1322年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Cheyne(이)가 대략 1274년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander de Cheney II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Say(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1302년 영국 켄트에서 Margaret Shurland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Patrixbourne, Kent, England: Patrixbourne, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Cheyne nasceu aproximadamente 1274, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander de Cheney II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Say, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Shurland aproximadamente 1302, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1322, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Cheyne родился около 1274 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Alexander de Cheney II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Say, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Shurland около 1302 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1322 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Cheyne nació aproximadamente 1274, en Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander de Cheney II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Agnes de Say, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Shurland aproximadamente 1302, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1322, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años.
